scripts.init: npm install && dotnet restore && dotnet tool restore
scripts.fable: npm run fantomas && dotnet fable --lang typescript --outDir ../generated --cwd ./src/Wilnaatahl.Core
scripts.build: npm run fable && npm run prettier && tsc && vite build
scripts.dev: npm run fable && npm run prettier && vite
scripts.preview: npm run fable && npm run prettier && vite preview
scripts.test:koota: dotnet fable tests/Wilnaatahl.ECS.Tests --lang typescript --outDir tests/Wilnaatahl.ECS.Tests/out --noCache && npx vite-node tests/Wilnaatahl.ECS.Tests/out/Runner.ts
scripts.coverage: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('TestResults',{recursive:true,force:true})" && dotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" --results-directory TestResults
scripts.coverage:check: npm run coverage && reportgenerator -reports:TestResults/**/coverage.cobertura.xml -targetdir:coveragereport -reporttypes:JsonSummary && dotnet fsi scripts/CheckCoverage.fsx
scripts.format: npm run prettier && npm run fantomas
